all.en: Notice is hereby given to all shareholders of Lumen Pacific Holdings.
all.zh: 謹此通知 Lumen Pacific Holdings 全體股東。

all.en: The annual general meeting will be held on June 14, 2026.
all.zh: 年度股東會將於 2026 年 6 月 14 日舉行。

all.en: The meeting starts at nine in the morning local time.
all.zh: 會議將於當地時間上午 9 點開始。

all.en: It takes place at the Grand Pacific Hotel ballroom in Singapore.
all.zh: 地點為新加坡 Grand Pacific Hotel 宴會廳。

all.en: A live webcast will also be available through the investor portal.
all.zh: 亦可透過投資人入口網站觀看現場直播。

all.en: Registration opens at seven thirty for in-person attendees.
all.zh: 現場與會者報到時間為 07:30。

all.en: Please bring a valid photo identification and your share certificate.
all.zh: 請攜帶有效附照身分證件及股票憑證。

all.en: Beneficial owners must present a letter from their broker.
all.zh: 實質受益人須出示券商出具之證明文件。

all.en: The agenda includes six items requiring shareholder approval.
all.zh: 議程包含六項須股東通過之議案。

all.en: Item one, adoption of the audited financial statements for 2025.
all.zh: 議案一，採認 2025 年度經會計師查核之財務報表。

all.en: Item two, declaration of a final dividend of forty cents per share.
all.zh: 議案二，宣告每股 40 美分之期末股息。

all.en: Item three, re-election of three directors retiring by rotation.
all.zh: 議案三，改選三位依章程輪替之董事。

all.en: Item four, reappointment of Cromwell & Yates as external auditors.
all.zh: 議案四，續任 Cromwell & Yates 為外部會計師。

all.en: Item five, approval of the revised long-term incentive plan.
all.zh: 議案五，通過修訂後之長期激勵計畫。

all.en: Item six, authorization for share buybacks of up to ten percent.
all.zh: 議案六，授權公司買回庫藏股至多 10%。

all.en: Detailed explanatory notes appear in the attached information circular.
all.zh: 詳細說明請參閱所附資訊通函。

all.en: Shareholders unable to attend may appoint a proxy in writing.
all.zh: 無法出席之股東得以書面委派代理人。

all.en: Proxy forms must reach the registrar at least forty-eight hours in advance.
all.zh: 委託書須於會前至少 48 小時送達股務代理機構。

all.en: Electronic voting through our portal will close one hour before the meeting.
all.zh: 電子投票將於會議開始前一小時關閉。

all.en: Light refreshments will be served after the formal proceedings conclude.
all.zh: 正式議程結束後將供應簡單茶點。

all.en: Members of the executive team will be available for informal questions.
all.zh: 經營團隊成員將出席接受非正式提問。

all.en: Translation services will be provided in Mandarin and Japanese.
all.zh: 現場提供中文與日文口譯服務。

all.en: Please refer media inquiries to the corporate communications office.
all.zh: 媒體相關詢問請洽企業傳訊室。

all.en: By order of the board, Aliyah Chen, Company Secretary, dated April 30.
all.zh: 依董事會指示，公司秘書 Aliyah Chen，4 月 30 日。

all.en: Hard copy circulars are available upon request from the registrar office.
all.zh: 如需紙本通函，請向股務代理機構索取。

all.en: Shareholders with accessibility needs should notify the office before June 5.
all.zh: 有無障礙需求之股東請於 6 月 5 日前通知本室。

all.en: Photography and recording during the meeting are strictly not permitted.
all.zh: 會議期間嚴禁攝影與錄影。

all.en: Questions submitted in advance via the portal will be prioritized.
all.zh: 透過入口網站事前提交之問題將優先處理。

all.en: Voting results will be announced on our website by the next business day.
all.zh: 投票結果將於下一工作日於官網公告。

all.en: Independent scrutineers will oversee the ballot in accordance with regulations.
all.zh: 獨立計票人將依規定監督投票過程。

all.en: Parking validation is offered for guests using the hotel basement garage.
all.zh: 於飯店地下停車場停車之來賓可獲停車折抵。

all.en: Investor relations staff will be stationed at the registration desk.
all.zh: 投資人關係人員將駐守於報到櫃台。

all.en: Thank you for your continued trust in Lumen Pacific Holdings Limited.
all.zh: 感謝您對 Lumen Pacific Holdings Limited 一直以來的信任。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you at next month's important gathering.
all.zh: 期待於下個月的重要會議中與您相會。

all.en: Annual reports may be downloaded from the investor section of our website.
all.zh: 年度報告可於本公司網站投資人專區下載。

all.en: Printed copies will be available at the registration desk on meeting day.
all.zh: 會議當日報到櫃台將備有紙本報告。

all.en: Shareholders are encouraged to submit written questions before May 30.
all.zh: 歡迎股東於 5 月 30 日前以書面提出問題。

all.en: Our chief executive will deliver a strategic update following the formal agenda.
all.zh: 正式議程結束後，本公司執行長將進行策略更新報告。

all.en: Board members will participate in a question and answer panel afterward.
all.zh: 其後董事會成員將參與問答座談。

all.en: Dress code for the meeting is business attire throughout the venue.
all.zh: 全會議場合服裝規定為商務正裝。

all.en: Security checks at the entrance may take an additional fifteen minutes.
all.zh: 入口處安全檢查可能多花費 15 分鐘。

all.en: Please plan your arrival accordingly to ensure timely seating before nine.
all.zh: 請依此安排抵達時間，以確保 9 點前準時入座。

all.en: A formal photograph of the board will be taken during morning tea break.
all.zh: 上午茶歇期間將拍攝董事會正式合影。

all.en: Investor relations welcomes one-on-one meetings scheduled in advance with management.
all.zh: 投資人關係部歡迎事先與管理階層安排一對一會議。

all.en: Honestly, my father attends this meeting every year just to grab the printed annual report for his bookshelf.
all.zh: 老實說，我爸每年都來參加股東會，就為了拿那本印製精美的年報擺在書架上。

all.en: He says the cover art alone is worth the early morning subway ride from his neighborhood.
all.zh: 他說光是封面設計就值得從他家社區搭那班一大早的地鐵過來。

all.en: If you bring a small umbrella, the walk from the subway station stays pleasant even in light rain.
all.zh: 如果您帶把小傘，就算下點小雨，從地鐵站走過來也還算舒服。

all.en: Coffee at the hotel lobby reopens half an hour before registration officially begins.
all.zh: 飯店大廳的咖啡會在報到正式開始前半小時開放。

all.en: Last year my mother in law tried four different pastries during the tea break alone.
all.zh: 去年我婆婆光是茶歇就試了四種不同的點心。

all.en: She still talks about the matcha financier she had next to the projector screen.
all.zh: 她到現在還會提投影幕旁邊那個抹茶費南雪有多好吃。

all.en: Please be patient with first time shareholders who may need extra guidance at the registration desk.
all.zh: 對於第一次來的股東，他們在報到櫃台可能需要多一點協助，請大家多包涵。

all.en: Our staff truly enjoy walking newcomers through the voting process step by step.
all.zh: 我們的工作人員真心樂於一步步帶領新手完成投票流程。

all.en: Feel free to introduce yourself to a board member during the photo opportunity around half past ten.
all.zh: 上午十點半左右的合影時間，歡迎主動向董事會成員自我介紹。

all.en: We look forward to a warm gathering of old friends and new faces alike next month.
all.zh: 我們期待下個月舊雨新知共聚一堂的溫馨時刻。
